input.testCaseTitle: Email Notification Not Triggered for Certain Update Workflow Transitions in Product Workflow (PIM)
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-387 reported defect: Email Notification Not Triggered for Certain Update Workflow Transitions in Product Workflow (PIM)
input.errorMessage: *Description:* In the PIM Product Workflow, email notifications are not triggered for specific transitions performed by *Product Head* and *Marketing Head*. These transitions are expected to send emails but currently result in *no email being triggered*. |Role|Current Status|Action Taken|New Status|Mail Expected To|Mail Triggered| |Product Head|InReview|Update to Marketing Manager|Update Required|To: Marketing Manager CC: Product Manager|❌ No| |Marketing Head|InReview|Update to Marketing…

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: Product Head and Marketing Head update transitions had incomplete notification-recipient logic. The Marketing Manager CC path was missing on the Marketing Head to Product Head update flow until the mail rule was corrected.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.88. auth-permissions is defensible because the symptom is role-specific, but the evidence points to notification rule logic.
